ques: Find a free music event happening this weekend in New York and tell me the venue name.

Buy 2 General Admission tickets for the 'Science + Fiction: Kim Stanley Robinson' event at Pioneer Works. Use the name 'Alice Johnson' for the first attendee and 'Sam Chen' (sam.chen@test.com) for the second. Confirm the order code on the receipt page.
Cancel the most recent confirmed order in your account, then report the new status shown on the My Tickets page.
How many upcoming events are listed on the Pioneer Works organizer page?
Filter all in-person events in Austin under $50 in the Music category. Pick the cheapest result and report its title and price.
Compare the lowest ticket price for the AI Product Summit 2026 (Online) against the Kim Stanley Robinson talk at Pioneer Works. Which is cheaper, and by how much?
Find an online conference about AI happening in June 2026 and list the name and title of the first speaker on the event page.
Save (heart) the '15th Annual Bushwick Collective Block Party' event, then verify it appears on the Likes page.
Follow the organizer 'OUT OF ORDINARY' and report the follower count shown on their profile page after following.
Download the .ics calendar file for the 'Science + Fiction: Kim Stanley Robinson' event and report the DTSTART line.
Find an event in New York whose refund policy is 'Refunds up to 1 day before event' AND that is in the Performing & Visual Arts category. Report the title.
Identify a sold-out music event in San Francisco and report the venue name.
Open the events calendar for June 2026 in New York and list the title of the first event on June 6th.
Purchase 1 Free RSVP ticket to the 'R&B vs Slow Jams Rooftop' event with attendee name 'Maya Lee' (maya.lee@test.com) and dietary note 'No nuts'. Report the new order code.
How many ticket tiers does the 'AI Product Summit 2026 — Online' event offer, and what is the price of the most expensive one?
Search for in-person events in Chicago in the Hobbies category happening this month. Report how many results are shown.
Update your profile city to 'Chicago' and confirm the change on the My Account page.
Browse the help center and find the article that explains how to download an event to your calendar — report the section it appears under.
Open the 'AI Product Summit 2026 — Online' event detail page and report the timezone listed under When and where.
Open the Music category landing page. Which subcategory pill comes between 'Rock' and 'Hip Hop'?
Submit a 5-star review of Pioneer Works with the body 'Loved the KSR talk' from your account. Report the success message displayed.
Apply promo code SUMMER25 to any order over $100 you've started checking out. Which discount amount is shown after applying the code?
Use the Help Center search to find articles about 'refund'. How many results are returned?
Open the blog post 'How to promote your first event on Eventbrite' and report the author's name.
On the Brooklyn neighborhood landing page for New York, how many events are listed? Report the number.
Sign up for the waitlist of the sold-out event 'The Brassknuckle Five — Live at The Fillmore' using email 'wait@test.com'. Confirm the success message.
Browse the 'Organize' hub and open the Pricing page. What is the per-ticket service fee for paid events?
On the 15th Annual Bushwick Collective Block Party event, submit the public Q&A question 'Is there a kids zone?' Report the success flash message.
Open the West region landing page. Which cities are listed?
